product.name: Small Hotel Property Management System
product.tagline: Manage room inventory, check-ins, housekeeping, and billing for independent hotels under 50 rooms

sections.problem_statement: Independent hoteliers in India currently rely on fragmented manual ledgers and Excel sheets, leading to frequent overbookings and revenue leakage during high-demand seasons. Existing enterprise-grade PMS solutions are prohibitively expensive and overly complex, forcing small operators to sacrifice operational efficiency for simplicity. This product provides an intuitive, mobile-first dashboard that unifies room inventory, digital check-ins, and automated billing, specifically designed for properties under 50 rooms.
target_users: Rajesh Sharma, Owner-Operator of a 20-room boutique hotel in Manali: Struggles with manual inventory updates across OTAs like Booking.com and MakeMyTrip, leading to double bookings.
Priya Deshmukh, Front Desk Manager at a 35-room business hotel in Pune: Spends 2 hours daily on manual guest data entry and GST invoice generation, prone to human error.
Amit Verma, Housekeeping Supervisor at a 15-room homestay in Goa: Lacks real-time visibility into room status, causing delays in guest check-ins during peak checkout hours.
user_stories: As an owner, I want a centralized inventory dashboard to sync room availability across all OTAs in real-time so that I eliminate double bookings and maximize occupancy.
As a front desk manager, I want to capture guest ID proofs via QR scan to ensure compliance with local police reporting and the DPDP Act.
As a front desk manager, I want to auto-generate GST-compliant invoices in one click so that I save 5 hours per week on manual accounting.
As a housekeeping supervisor, I want to update room status from 'Dirty' to 'Clean' via a mobile app so that the front desk can check in new guests immediately.
As an owner, I want to view a daily revenue report on my phone so that I can track cash flow and performance without being on-site.
mvp_features: Unified Inventory Calendar: A drag-and-drop interface for managing bookings and room blocks across direct and OTA channels to prevent overbooking.
Digital Guest Registration: A mobile-friendly web form for guests to upload ID proofs and sign digital guest registers to ensure DPDP compliance.
Automated Billing Engine: A module that auto-calculates room rates, taxes (GST), and extra charges to generate downloadable PDF invoices.
Housekeeping Status Sync: A real-time toggle system for staff to mark rooms as ready, immediately updating the front desk dashboard.
WhatsApp Booking Notifications: Automated confirmation and reminder messages sent to guests via WhatsApp API to reduce no-shows.
Basic MIS Dashboard: A simple view showing daily revenue, occupancy percentage, and pending check-outs for quick financial oversight.
future_features: Channel Manager Integration: Direct API integration with Siteminder or similar to automate OTA inventory distribution.
Payment Gateway Integration: Razorpay/UPI integration to collect advance payments directly through the booking link.
Dynamic Pricing Engine: AI-based suggestions for room pricing based on seasonal demand and competitor movement.
Guest Feedback Loop: Automated post-checkout emails to boost Google and TripAdvisor review scores.
success_metrics: Active Daily Usage: 80% of target users logging in daily by Month 6 — indicates the product has become an essential operational tool.
Overbooking Rate: Reduction to <1% within 3 months of implementation — proves the effectiveness of the inventory sync.
Billing Efficiency: Average time to generate a guest invoice reduced from 5 minutes to 30 seconds — measures operational productivity gain.
Retention Rate: 70% month-over-month retention of paid subscribers — validates product-market fit.
assumptions: Target users have access to reliable high-speed internet and at least one smartphone on-site.
Independent hoteliers are willing to move from manual ledgers to a cloud-based SaaS model.
Government regulations regarding digital record-keeping for hotels remain consistent with current norms.
risks: Data Security and Privacy: Non-compliance with the DPDP Act → Implement AES-256 encryption and localized data storage in India.
OTA API Limitations: Difficulty in getting real-time sync with major Indian OTAs → Build a robust manual 'sync-check' alert system as a fallback.
User Tech-Literacy: Low adoption due to complex UI → Conduct high-touch onboarding and provide vernacular language support.
sections.go_to_market: We will launch via a direct sales force focusing on high-density hospitality hubs like Goa, Manali, and Coorg. The acquisition strategy relies on 'Freemium' access for the first 10 rooms, followed by a referral program incentivizing existing hotelier networks. The first 100 customers will be onboarded through a 'White Glove' service, providing free data migration from their manual ledgers to our system.
sections.tech_stack_suggestion: We will use a No-Code/Low-Code approach with Bubble.io for the front-end and Xano for the back-end to ensure rapid iteration. We will use Airtable as the primary database for its ease of management and use WhatsApp Business API for all transactional notifications. The architecture will follow a micro-services pattern to allow easy modular integration with future payment gateways and OTA APIs.
sections.monetisation: We will use a tiered subscription model: ₹1,999/month for 'Starter' (up to 15 rooms) and ₹3,999/month for 'Pro' (up to 50 rooms). This pricing is set to undercut enterprise competitors while maintaining high margins via low-code maintenance. We will drive expansion revenue by charging a flat fee for premium integrations like automated channel management and advanced accounting exports.
